
MCMC Diagnostics {data-navmenu="Diagnostics"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### MCMC Summary

```{r mcmc_summary}
diag <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics
rows <- list(
  data.frame(Property = "Iterations per chain",
             Value = if (!is.null(diag$n_iter)) as.character(diag$n_iter) else "Unknown",
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(Property = "Chains",
             Value = if (!is.null(diag$n_chains)) as.character(diag$n_chains) else "Unknown",
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(Property = "Divergent transitions",
             Value = if (!is.null(diag$n_div) && !is.na(diag$n_div)) as.character(diag$n_div) else "Unknown",
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(Property = "Parameters sampled",
             Value = if (!is.null(diag$parameters)) as.character(length(diag$parameters)) else "Unknown",
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
)
if (!is.null(diag$rhat)) {
  rh <- diag$rhat[is.finite(diag$rhat)]
  rows <- c(rows, list(
    data.frame(Property = "Max Rhat",    Value = sprintf("%.4f", max(rh, na.rm=TRUE)), stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(Property = "Rhat > 1.05", Value = as.character(sum(rh > 1.05, na.rm=TRUE)), stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
  ))
}
if (!is.null(diag$ess)) {
  es <- diag$ess[is.finite(diag$ess)]
  rows <- c(rows, list(
    data.frame(Property = "Min ESS",    Value = sprintf("%.0f", min(es, na.rm=TRUE)), stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(Property = "Median ESS", Value = sprintf("%.0f", stats::median(es, na.rm=TRUE)), stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
  ))
}
knitr::kable(
  x         = do.call(rbind, rows),
  caption   = "MCMC convergence summary",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

### Rhat Distribution

```{r mcmc_rhat, eval=!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$rhat)}
rh <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics$rhat
rh <- rh[is.finite(rh)]
n_chains_diag <- if (!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$n_chains)) mv$mcmc_diagnostics$n_chains else 1L
n_gt105 <- sum(rh > 1.05, na.rm = TRUE)
n_gt101 <- sum(rh > 1.01, na.rm = TRUE)

p <- plot_ly()
p <- add_histogram(
  p = p, x = rh,
  marker = list(color = "rgba(31,119,180,0.6)",
                line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)),
  name = "Rhat", showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = "Rhat bin %{x:.3f}: %{y}<extra></extra>"
)
p <- add_trace(
  p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
  x = c(1.01, 1.01), y = c(0, length(rh) * 0.5),
  line = list(color = "#ff7f0e", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"),
  name = "1.01 threshold", showlegend = TRUE
)
p <- add_trace(
  p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
  x = c(1.05, 1.05), y = c(0, length(rh) * 0.5),
  line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"),
  name = "1.05 threshold", showlegend = TRUE
)
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title  <- "Rhat (Gelman-Rubin)"
lay$yaxis$title  <- "Count"
lay$showlegend   <- TRUE
lay$annotations  <- list(list(
  x = 0.98, y = 0.96, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
  text = paste0(">1.01: ", n_gt101, "  >1.05: ", n_gt105),
  showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "right",
  font = list(size = 11), bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"
))
p <- do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### ESS Distribution

```{r mcmc_ess, eval=!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$ess)}
es <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics$ess
es <- es[is.finite(es)]
n_chains_ess <- if (!is.null(mv$mcmc_diagnostics$n_chains)) mv$mcmc_diagnostics$n_chains else 1L
thresh <- 100 * n_chains_ess
n_low  <- sum(es < thresh, na.rm = TRUE)

# Dotplot: 30 worst-ESS parameters
top_n  <- min(30L, length(es))
es_ord <- sort(es)[seq_len(top_n)]
par_nm <- names(es_ord)
if (is.null(par_nm)) par_nm <- paste0("par_", seq_along(es_ord))

p <- plot_ly()
p <- add_markers(
  p = p,
  x = es_ord,
  y = factor(par_nm, levels = rev(par_nm)),
  marker = list(color = "#1f77b4", size = 7,
                line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)),
  showlegend = FALSE,
  hovertemplate = "%{y}: ESS = %{x:.0f}<extra></extra>"
)
p <- add_trace(
  p = p, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
  x = c(thresh, thresh), y = c(0.5, top_n + 0.5),
  line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 1.5, dash = "dash"),
  name = paste0("100×chains (", thresh, ")"), showlegend = TRUE
)
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title  <- "Effective sample size (ESS)"
lay$yaxis$title  <- ""
lay$showlegend   <- TRUE
lay$height       <- max(300, top_n * 18)
lay$annotations  <- list(list(
  x = 0.98, y = 0.04, xref = "paper", yref = "paper",
  text = paste0("ESS < ", thresh, ": ", n_low, " pars"),
  showarrow = FALSE, xanchor = "right",
  font = list(size = 11), bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"
))
p <- do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Spawning Biomass Posterior

```{r mcmc_sb}
mv_plot_trend(
  df    = mv$spawning_biomass,
  ylab  = "Spawning biomass",
  title = "Spawning Biomass (posterior median + 95% CI)"
)
```

### Recruitment Posterior

```{r mcmc_rec}
mv_plot_trend(
  df     = mv$recruitment,
  ylab   = "Recruitment",
  colour = "#2ca02c",
  title  = "Recruitment (posterior median + 95% CI)"
)
```

### Legal HR Posterior

```{r mcmc_hr}
mv_plot_trend(
  df     = mv$legal_hr,
  ylab   = "Legal harvest rate",
  title  = "Legal HR (posterior median + 95% CI)",
  ref_line = if (has_refpts &&
    !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy))
    mv$ref_points$lUmsy else NULL,
  ref_label = if (has_refpts &&
    !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy))
    "Umsy" else NULL
)
```
